title: geissorhiza brehmii
intro: Geissorhiza brehmii is a species of cormous perennial plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the mountain iris. It has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In traditional medicine, Geissorhiza brehmii is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are often used to treat various ailments, including skin infections and respiratory issues.
